assertions.title: Successful login with valid email credentials

steps.observed: Login form displayed with Email tab active

assertions.title: Successful login with valid phone credentials

steps.action: Check seed data for test user phone number
steps.expected: Phone number exists in seed data
steps.observed: Test user phone field is null — no phone credential in seed data

assertions.issues: Test user (test@example.com) has no phone number set in seed data. The auth system supports phone login (credentials provider queries by phone), but there is no phone credential to test with. Seed script does not populate the phone field.

steps.expected: Error message displayed, remain on login page
steps.observed: Error message 'Invalid email/phone or password' displayed, URL remains /login
No next-auth.session-token cookie set (only csrf-token present)

assertions.title: Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login

steps.expected: Login form displayed, no protected content visible
steps.observed: Login form fully rendered, no My page content visible

assertions.title: Logged-in user accessing login redirects away

steps.observed: Authenticated, redirected to Goods home page

steps.expected: Redirect to home page, login form not rendered
steps.observed: Login page fully rendered at /login, no redirect occurred

evidence.network: GET /login -> 200 (login page served to authenticated user)

assertions.issues: Authenticated users are not redirected away from /login. The login page renders fully with the login form even when a valid session token exists. The middleware or login page component does not check for existing authentication to redirect away.

steps.expected: Remain on Goods home page, session persists
steps.observed: Page reloaded, URL remains http://localhost:3100/, Goods page content displayed

blockers.description: Test user has no phone number in seed data, preventing phone login testing (VAL-AUTH-004)
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked database directly - phone field is null for test@example.com. Seed script does not set phone field.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-005, VAL-AUTH-010, VAL-AUTH-014), 1 failed (VAL-AUTH-011: authenticated users not redirected away from /login), 1 blocked (VAL-AUTH-004: no phone credential in seed data)
